name: Panzanella (Bread Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium cucumber, seeded and sliced into 1-inch pieces
1 bulb fennel, cut in half and sliced into 1/8-inch slices
3 cups cubed day-old bread (crusty peasant loaf)
1 red bell pepper, cored, seeded and sliced into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, add the basic raw tomato sauce, cucumber, fennel, and cubed bread. Toss to mix.
2. Pour olive oil and vinegar over the mixture and toss again.
3. Add capers, red onion, and bell pepper, tossing once more.
The entire process takes no more than 5 minutes. The panzanella may be served immediately or after an hour. As time passes, the salad becomes softer in texture.
Yield: 4 servings
